ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "czone" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital zone */,
  "has_insurance" REAL /* Fraction of patients with insurance */,
  "cs_frac_black" REAL /* Fraction of the population that is Black */,
  "cs_frac_hisp" REAL /* Fraction of the population that is Hispanic */,
  "gt_hs_educ" REAL /* Fraction of the population with educational attainment greater than high school */,
  "has_medicaid" REAL /* Fraction of patients enrolled in Medicaid */,
  "hosp_beds" REAL /* Number of hospital beds available */,
  "inctot" REAL /* Total income of the community */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median house value in the community */,
  "occupancy" REAL /* Occupancy rate of hospital beds */,
  "physical_disab" REAL /* Fraction of patients with physical disabilities */,
  "poor_share" REAL /* Fraction of the population that is poor */,
  "pymt_charity_patients" REAL /* Total amount paid by charity for patients */,
  "reimb_penroll_adj10" REAL /* Total reimbursement adjusted for enrollment */,
  "share_hosp_forprofit" REAL /* Fraction of for-profit hospitals */,
  "share_hosp_teaching" REAL /* Fraction of teaching hospitals */,
  "uncomp_charity_patients" REAL /* Total amount of uncompensated charity patients */,
  "num_doctors" INTEGER /* Number of doctors in the hospital */,
  "num_nurses" INTEGER /* Number of nurses in the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of the hospital (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("czone")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_status" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "czone" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital zone */,
  "has_insurance" REAL /* Fraction of patients with insurance */,
  "has_medicaid" REAL /* Fraction of patients enrolled in Medicaid */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., private, government-funded) */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_status_czone FOREIGN KEY ("czone") REFERENCES hospital_data ("czone")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "czone" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital zone */,
  "cs_frac_black" REAL /* Fraction of the population that is Black */,
  "cs_frac_hisp" REAL /* Fraction of the population that is Hispanic */,
  "gt_hs_educ" REAL /* Fraction of the population with educational attainment greater than high school */,
  "poor_share" REAL /* Fraction of the population that is poor */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_czone FOREIGN KEY ("czone") REFERENCES hospital_data ("czone")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource record */,
  "czone" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital zone */,
  "hosp_beds" REAL /* Number of hospital beds available */,
  "inctot" REAL /* Total income of the community */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median house value in the community */,
  "equipment_value" REAL /* Total value of medical equipment */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_resources_czone FOREIGN KEY ("czone") REFERENCES hospital_data ("czone")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy_rates" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy record */,
  "czone" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital zone */,
  "occupancy" REAL /* Occupancy rate of hospital beds */,
  "avg_los" REAL /* Average length of stay (LOS) in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_rates_czone FOREIGN KEY ("czone") REFERENCES hospital_data ("czone")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "czone" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital zone */,
  "pymt_charity_patients" REAL /* Total amount paid by charity for patients */,
  "reimb_penroll_adj10" REAL /* Total reimbursement adjusted for enrollment */,
  "share_hosp_forprofit" REAL /* Fraction of for-profit hospitals */,
  "share_hosp_teaching" REAL /* Fraction of teaching hospitals */,
  "uncomp_charity_patients" REAL /* Total amount of uncompensated charity patients */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_czone FOREIGN KEY ("czone") REFERENCES hospital_data ("czone")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "czone" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital zone */,
  "physical_disab" REAL /* Fraction of patients with physical disabilities */,
  "poor_share" REAL /* Fraction of the population that is poor */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate in the population */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Smoking rate in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_czone FOREIGN KEY ("czone") REFERENCES hospital_data ("czone")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user record */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, healthcare professional) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "czone" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital zone */,
  "predicted_insurance_rate" REAL /* Predicted insurance rate in the zone */,
  "predicted_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Predicted number of hospitalizations in the zone */,
  "predicted_health_metric" REAL /* Predicted health metric value in the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_czone FOREIGN KEY ("czone") REFERENCES hospital_data ("czone")
)
